data.title: Smart Machines market set to grow at 20.8% CAGR, reaching $1.2 trillion by 2030, from $455 billion in 2025.
data.description: The latest study from BCC Research indicates that the global smart machines market is set to rise from $455 billion in 2025 to $1.2 trillion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 20.8%. The report delves into revenue trends across segments like product type, component, end use, and region. It covers North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and Rest of the World, offering insights into market dynamics, growth potential, emerging technologies, and the competitive landscape. The report targets stakeholders aiming to leverage opportunities and make strategic decisions in a rapidly expanding technological landscape. Key growth drivers include automation in manufacturing, demand for autonomous robots in various sectors, adoption of autonomous vehicles for safer and efficient transportation, and advancements in AI and machine learning propelling smart machine capabilities. The insights provided aim to aid industrial companies and investors in fostering innovation and maintaining a competitive edge.

data.title: e.l.f. Cosmetics sponsors Tottenham Hotspur teams on Sept. 24 matches; Women vs Aston Villa at 7 PM BST, Men vs Doncaster at 7:45 PM BST.
data.description: In Oakland, California, e.l.f. Cosmetics, a brand under e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE:ELF), is boosting its collaboration with Tottenham Hotspur Football Club for the Carabao Cup. Tottenham Hotspur Women will play against Aston Villa at 7:00 PM BST and the Men's team will face Doncaster in the same competition at 7:45 PM BST. Both teams will showcase the e.l.f. brand on their kits in this significant partnership expansion. This move emphasizes e.l.f.'s commitment to visibility and association in sports events.

data.title: Vision Rescue in Boca Raton, FL, is now the go-to online shop for eye health, offering doctor-recommended vitamins, eye drops, and cleansers. Reshaping eye care shopping with a user-friendly platform.
data.description: A consumer-focused eye health platform called Vision Rescue, located in Boca Raton, Florida, was established on September 24, 2025. It offers a variety of doctor-recommended products such as vitamins, eye drops, and eyelid cleansers. This online destination aims to change the way people purchase everyday eye care items by providing a convenient one-stop shop experience.

data.title: Comcast invests $500,000 to open Lift Zone in Chicago for digital skills training, providing free WiFi and technology.
data.description: A recent investment of $500,000 has led to the establishment of a new workforce development hub in Chicago's Austin neighborhood. Comcast has unveiled a flagship Lift Zone at the Aspire Center for Workforce Innovation. This initiative offers free WiFi, advanced technology resources, and digital skills programming. The aim is to support community members in acquiring essential skills for the modern workforce.

data.title: Areté & Turion Space partner to launch Areté's event camera on Turion DROID.alpha™ spacecraft in 2027. Advance Space Domain Awareness.
data.description: In Northridge, California on September 24, 2025, a partnership was revealed between Areté and Turion Space. The collaboration involves sending Areté's advanced event camera on a Turion DROID.alpha™ spacecraft as a hosted payload set to launch in 2027. This initiative is in support of the Air Force Research.

data.title: DCO and Member States launch WE-Elevate to empower female-led businesses in the digital economy.
data.description: New York - A collaborative effort between DCO and member states has formed WE-Elevate, aiming to support female-led enterprises in the digital economy. This initiative seeks to empower women entrepreneurs and drive the advancement of their businesses. Key components of the program include mentorship, networking opportunities, and financial support. The goal is to increase the representation of women in the digital sector and foster their growth. This joint effort reflects a commitment to gender equality and economic empowerment.
Officials are making arrangements for Trump to visit Japan next month - Sources citing Government Officials.

data.title: proteanTecs validates IP technology on TSMC's 2nm process node. Leader in semiconductor analytics. Member of TSMC IP Alliance.
data.description: In Haifa, Israel, proteanTecs®, a prominent player in semiconductor health and performance monitoring, revealed the successful validation of its IP-based technology at TSMC's cutting-edge 2nm (N2P) process node. As part of the TSMC IP Alliance Program within TSMC's Open Innovation Platform®, this milestone demonstrates progress in the field. The company's innovative solution has been proven on silicon, solidifying their position in the industry.

data.title: McKesson stock reaches record high with improved price performance, earning upgrade in IBD Relative Strength Rating.
data.description: McKesson has demonstrated a positive trend in its price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The stock has surged to a record high, indicating improved price strength for the health products giant.

data.title: Study finds Ethereum's Layer-2 rollups misprice small transactions, risking costs and DoS attacks. #cryptocurrency #Ethereum
data.description: A recent study indicates that there are challenges with pricing small transactions on Ethereum layer-2 rollups. This issue could potentially lead to increased costs and leave the platform vulnerable to denial-of-service attacks. Ethereum, a popular blockchain platform for decentralized applications and smart contracts, is utilized by millions of users worldwide. The study highlights the importance of addressing these issues to ensure the seamless and secure operation of the platform.

data.title: Cogeco Inc. and Cogeco Communications Inc. (TSX: CGO, CCA) to release Q4 2025 financial results on Oct 29 after market closes. Conference call on Oct 30 at 8:00 a.m. (EDT).
data.description: Montreal, September 24, 2025 - Cogeco Inc. (TSX: CGO) and Cogeco Communications Inc. (TSX: CCA) have announced their upcoming financial results for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025, ending on August 31, 2025. The results will be released on Wednesday, October 29, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call is scheduled for Thursday, October 30, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. (EDT) to discuss the financial and operating outcomes. Those interested can join a live audio webcast of the analyst call to learn more.

data.title: XPO named to 2026 FreightTech 100 by FreightWaves, 8th time in a row. Only LTL provider on list.
data.description: XPO, a prominent freight transportation company in North America, headquartered in Greenwich, Conn., has been recognized for the eighth year in a row by FreightWaves. The company has made it to the 2026 FreightTech 100 list, which showcases the most groundbreaking companies in the industry. XPO stands out as the sole LTL freight transportation provider on the list, highlighting its continued innovation and leadership in the sector. This acknowledgment underscores XPO's position as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Discover Lehigh Valley in Pennsylvania offers autumn getaway with harvest fun, Halloween thrills, and scenic beauty.
data.description: Experience the enchanting beauty of autumn in LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa., as the vibrant colors of the season come to life. From thrilling Halloween events to local harvest festivals, visitors can enjoy a memorable fall escape. Starting on September 24, 2025, Discover Lehigh Valley® invites guests to immerse themselves in the scenic wonders and festive atmosphere of the region. Embrace the season with a variety of activities and attractions, promising a picture-perfect experience. Don't miss out on this opportunity to witness the stunning display of fall foliage and immerse yourself in the essence of autumn.

data.title: Record-breaking 30th edition of Furniture China 2025 wraps up in Shanghai with over 3,000 participating brands.
data.description: The recent Furniture China exhibition, in its 30th edition, was held in Shanghai from September 10th to 13th, 2025, in conjunction with Maison Shanghai 2025 at SWEECC from September 9th to 12th, 2025. The event was jointly organized by the China National Furniture Association and Shanghai Sinoexpo Informa Markets. The theme for this edition was "BEYOND NEXT". The exhibition concluded successfully, attracting participation from numerous industry professionals and showcasing a wide range of innovative furniture designs and products.

data.title: Feinberg & Waller awards Mock Trial Leadership Award to LA students for equity, inclusion, access to justice - 2025.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Feinberg & Waller, APC reaffirmed its dedication to fostering equity, inclusion, access to justice, and leadership growth through its ongoing sponsorship of the Feinberg & Waller Mock Trial Leadership Award. This initiative highlights the firm's commitment to recognizing excellence in these areas. The award is intended to...

data.title: Toll Brothers to open luxury home community in Schertz, TX, offering modern homes on 100-ft-wide sites near San Antonio. Opening in fall 2025.
data.description: In Schertz, Texas, on September 24, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc. revealed that their latest San Antonio-region project, Toll Brothers at Windborne, will soon be introduced to the public. This upcoming community, situated at Graytown and Ivy Manor in Schertz, is expected to feature contemporary single-family residences on large 100-foot-wide lots. Just a 20-minute drive from downtown San Antonio, this neighborhood is set to open for sales in the fall of 2025. Toll Brothers, known as the primary builder of high-end homes in the U.S., looks forward to showcasing their newest development to prospective buyers.

data.title: CCM price upsized offering of $900 million of Senior Notes due 2030, from parent company CrossCountry Intermediate HoldCo.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Cleveland, the nation's biggest distributed-retail mortgage lender, CrossCountry Mortgage, LLC ("CCM"), revealed that its direct parent company, CrossCountry Intermediate HoldCo, LLC, successfully priced an increased offering of $900 million.
